mapper.insert: INSERT INTO player_clubs ( player_id, club_id, year_joined, year_left ) VALUES ( #{player.id}, #{club.id}, #{yearJoined}, #{yearLeft} )
mapper.select: SELECT pc.id, pc.player_id, pc.club_id, pc.year_joined, pc.year_left, p.full_name, p.position, p.birth_year, c.club_name FROM player_clubs pc JOIN players p ON pc.player_id = p.id JOIN clubs c ON pc.club_id = c.id WHERE pc.club_id = #{clubId} ORDER BY pc.year_joined DESC

SELECT pc.id, pc.player_id, pc.club_id, pc.year_joined, pc.year_left, p.full_name, p.position, p.birth_year, c.club_name FROM player_clubs pc JOIN players p ON pc.player_id = p.id JOIN clubs c ON pc.club_id = c.id WHERE pc.id = #{id}
